privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Chrome profile populated with 20 technical and 10 non-work bookmarks, and a corresponding synthetic browsing history SQLite database containing the same 30 URLs. The setup script explicitly injects these entries. The verifier logic strictly checks for the creation of 4 specific bookmark folders ('Schematics & Manuals', 'Safety & Logs', 'Part Suppliers', 'Sensors & Weather'), the deletion of 10 designated non-work domains from both bookmarks and history, the preservation of technical history, setting the Chrome base font size to 24, configuring a custom Grainger search engine with the keyword 'part', and setting two specific startup pages (radar.weather.gov and osha.gov/amusement-parks). All initial data structures and constraints are synthetically generated and validated against these explicit rules.
